title: Move UI toggle state from socket to hidden input
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/show_more_form_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ShowMoreFormLive). The form has an "Advanced settings" toggle. Instead of round-tripping the toggle to the server (no phx-change on the toggle, no :show_advanced in assigns), store the toggle as a hidden <input type="hidden" name="show_advanced" value="false" /> that JS can update client-side, OR use a <details>/<summary> element to keep the state entirely in the DOM. Must NOT have :show_advanced in socket assigns. Must NOT have a "toggle_advanced" handle_event.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing the server-round-trip anti-pattern and applying a client-side solution.
research_citation: John Elm Labs top-3 form mistakes #1
